item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: DTEX Achieves FedRAMP Authorization for UAM Compliance
item.description: DTEX has achieved FedRAMP Authorization for UAM compliance, sponsored by the U.S. Federal Trade Commission.

item.title: DTEX i³ Issues Threat Advisory for Mitigating Insider Abuse of Insecure Web Apps
item.description: Without the correct checks in place, web apps can open the door to insider abuse, throwing sensitive IP and employee privacy into jeopardy.

item.title: DTEX i³ Issues New Threat Advisory for Disrupting Foreign Interference
item.description: The DTEX i3 team has released a new threat advisory with critical indicators for disrupting foreign interference.

item.title: DTEX i³ Issues Threat Advisory for Mitigating Third-Party Zoom Risk
item.description: The DTEX i3 team has issued a new Insider Threat Advisory for mitigating third-party Zoom risk and the potential for data loss or theft.

item.title: DTEX i³ Issues Threat Advisory for Detecting the Use of Multiple Identities
item.description: DTEX i³ team has issued a Threat Advisory following investigations linking use of personal accounts on corporate devices with side gigs & extremist material spread.

item.title: DTEX i³ Threat Advisory Provides Detections for LOTL, C2 Abuse
item.description: This DTEX i3 Threat Advisory Provides Detections for LOTL, C2 Abuse, with reference to the APT41 case of 2023.

item.title: DTEX i³ Threat Advisory Reveals Growing Risk of Credential Abuse by Outside Adversaries
item.description: DTEX's latest Insider Threat Advisory highlights the growing risk of credential bleed between corporate and personal endpoints, and the threat of credential abuse.

item.title: DTEX Integrations for Insider Risk Management: Splunk and CrowdStrike
item.description: DTEX integrates with Splunk and CrowdStrike to enable organizations to take their insider risk management solution to the next level.

item.title: DTEX and Microsoft O365 E5: The Partner Opportunity
item.description: Discover how DTEX and Microsoft 365 E5 integrate to strengthen insider threat detection, accelerate DLP, and maximize security investments.

item.title: DTEX Named a Leader in the First GigaOm Radar for Insider Risk Management
item.description: DTEX named a leader in GigaOm's Insider Risk Management report, highlighting its advanced behavior analytics and AI-driven insights to combat insider threats.

item.title: From Reactive to Adaptive: DTEX NEXT on Securing the AI Era
item.description: Discover key takeaways from DTEX NEXT, including how insider risk management, risk-adaptive DLP, and AI governance empower proactive security.

item.title: DTEX Risk-Adaptive Data Loss Prevention: From Reactive to Proactive Security Powered by AI
item.description: DTEX is redefining data loss prevention with a bold, AI-powered solution that reinvents what DLP can and should be.

item.title: DTEX i³ Issues Threat Advisory to Combat DPRK IT Worker Infiltration
item.description: DTEX i³ Threat Advisory provides recommendations for combating DPRK IT worker infiltration through insider risk management.

item.title: Early Insider Risk Detection Hinges on Quality Data – Not AI
item.description: Where AI offers momentum, data provides the fuel from which to make educated decisions to make early insider risk detection possible.

item.title: Australia Enforces Insider Risk Management Programs to Combat Foreign Interference
item.description: Australia’s PSPF update mandates insider risk management programs across government, to help counter foreign threats and boost national security resilience.

item.title: Black Hat 2024: Why Knowing Your Users is the Ultimate Defense
item.description: Miss Black Hat 2024? DTEX's Blurred Lines event proved exactly why knowing your users is the ultimate defense.

item.title: Black Hat 2025: How Insider Risk Became the Frontline of Conflict
item.description: Black Hat 2025 panel reveals why insider risk is now a strategic, geopolitical security priority — and how C-suites can build resilience.

item.title: Why Insider Risk Management Is Key to Data Security and Cyber Resilience
item.description: Learn why insider risk management is essential to cyber resilience, and how a human-centric approach helps detect, mitigate, and prevent insider threats.

item.title: Building a Human-Centric Insider Risk Program | Three Experts Weigh In
item.description: Building a human-centric insider risk program has become a priority for most critical infrastructure entities. But how do you get started?

item.title: Busted: Misconceptions of Insider Risk Programs
item.description: Here are the top misconceptions of insider risk programs based on data-driven research by MITRE Corporation.

item.title: Insider Fraud: Combating the Growing Threat in Financial Services
item.description: Insider fraud is rising in financial services. Learn how to detect risks early, protect assets, and prevent costly breaches before they happen.

item.title: Building a Trust-First Cyber Resilience Strategy
item.description: Learn how CISOs can build cyber resilience by operationalizing trust across people, partners, and AI—turning collaboration into security impact.

item.title: Countering Foreign Interference: 2024 Insider Risk Report Takeaways
item.description: The 2024 Insider Risk Report provides high value insights and indicators to benefit any insider risk program or broader security mission.

item.title: Crawl, Walk, Run: How to Kickstart Your Insider Risk Program
item.description: Establishing an insider risk management program is a critical endeavor. This blog outlines how to kickstart your insider risk program.

item.title: Cybersecurity Awareness Month: Redefining Insider Risk in the Age of AI
item.description: This Cybersecurity Awareness Month, expand insider risk to AI systems. Learn why AI governance and adaptive protection define resilience.

item.title: Data Loss Prevention: Best Practices for Employee Layoffs
item.description: Layoffs are on the rise, and so too is insider risk. We're sharing data loss prevention best practices for employee layoffs.

item.title: Data loss prevention: The future is platformization
item.description: Data loss prevention is undergoing a significant evolution, as the industry increasingly leans into platformization and behavioral science.

item.title: Defense to Danger: An Insider’s Sale of Cyber Weapons
item.description: Analysis of the Williams insider case, detailing how privileged access enabled the theft and sale of sensitive cyber exploits and exposed gaps in trust and investigation.

item.title: DTEX Helps the A3C “Uplift Cyber Security Resilience”
item.description: In February, 2021 DTEX was excited to join a group of industry experts and distinguished guests for the Insider Threat Centre of Excellence.
